text: Wax performance report cold open p95 on Apple Silicon measured 9.2 ms after v2 improvements.
Wax performance report warm hybrid with previews measured 6.1 ms p95 on Apple Silicon.
Vector search engines compare USearch HNSW CPU backend against Metal brute-force GPU backend.
.wax containers can store SQLite FTS5 blobs inside lex segments while vectors live separately.
Offline search quality evaluation uses qrels, nDCG, recall, MRR, and judged query sets.
Hybrid search fusion combines text and vector candidates and may rerank results for better relevance.
Vector mode compare exact flat versus HNSW benchmarks warm vector and warm hybrid latency.
Preview rendering fetches documents by doc id and includes text snippets in the response.
